response.justification: Strong technical foundation with 20+ years of progressive engineering and staff-level experience, but insufficient demonstrated AI expertise for a Director-level AI Strategy role. Current AI work is limited to recent MCP/agent infrastructure exposure (1 month tenure), lacks recognized AI products or platforms, and has no advanced degree in AI-related field—all central to the role's focus.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year experience requirement with 20 years of engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Staff-level seniority with entrepreneurial experience as GISCollective founder since 2016, demonstrating leadership capability
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks in current role shows emerging alignment with AI domain
concerns: AI expertise is insufficient for a strategy-focused role: no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized thought leadership; AI work limited to recent MCP infrastructure (started April 2025)
No Master's or PhD in AI-related field as preferred; only Bachelor's degree in Computer Science
Career narrative is implementation-focused with no evidence of strategic influence, architectural decisions at scale, or AI domain thought leadership
